title: JavaScript Regular Expressions Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of RegExp syntax, methods, and basic pattern matching in JavaScript.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the best way to define a regular expression literal in JavaScript?
Which method returns a boolean representing if a string contains a match for a pattern?
What does the 'i' flag do at the end of a regular expression?
options: It replaces the first match only.

questions.question: What does the '+' quantifier represent in a regular expression match?
